svg.title: Network Planning and Zoning
svg.desc: Network zoning from public network to DMZ, management network, compute network, key traffic directions, and security principles.
svg.metadata: AGIOne diagrams semantic palette applied: primary #5F4ECF, primary-hover #4A3EB0, primary-subtle #ECE9F9, subtle-border #D8D2F0, terminal #1A1025, text #09090B/#3F3F46/#71717A, surfaces #FFFFFF/#F4F4F5/#FAFAFA, border #E4E4E7/#A1A1AA, blue #EEF1F8/#4A6298, success #EEF5F0/#3A7252, warning #F8F1EC/#8A5E38.

text.tspan: Network Zoning - Public -> DMZ -> Management Network -> Compute Network
Do not expose ports across VPCs
- Deny by default; allow by whitelist
- Internal services expose no public ports
